mapper.select: SELECT wl.id, wl.workstation_id, wl.action_detail, wl.create_time, u.real_name as workstation_name FROM workstation_log wl LEFT JOIN user u ON wl.workstation_id = u.id WHERE wl.id = #{id}

SELECT wl.id, wl.workstation_id, wl.action_detail, wl.create_time, u.real_name as workstation_name FROM workstation_log wl LEFT JOIN user u ON wl.workstation_id = u.id WHERE wl.workstation_id = #{workstationId} ORDER BY wl.create_time DESC
SELECT wl.id, wl.workstation_id, wl.action_detail, wl.create_time, u.real_name as workstation_name FROM workstation_log wl LEFT JOIN user u ON wl.workstation_id = u.id ORDER BY wl.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workstation_log (workstation_id, action_detail, create_time) VALUES (#{workstationId}, #{actionDetail}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT wl.id, wl.workstation_id, wl.action_detail, wl.create_time, u.real_name as workstation_name FROM workstation_log wl LEFT JOIN user u ON wl.workstation_id = u.id WHERE DATE(wl.create_time) = CURDATE() ORDER BY wl.create_time DESC
